name: Utilities
remarks: This is a replacement for CRhinoFileUtilities::FindFile().

methods.name: ChangeContentType
methods.signature: public static RenderContent ChangeContentType(RenderContent oldContent, Guid newType, bool harvestParameters)
methods.summary: Changes the type of a content. This deletes the content and creates a replacement of the specified type allowing the caller to decide about harvesting.

params.name: oldContent
params.doc: oldContent is the old content which is deleted.

params.name: newType
params.doc: The type of content to replace pOldContent with.

params.name: harvestParameters
params.doc: Determines whether or not parameter harvesting will be performed.

methods.name: FindFile(RhinoDoc, String)
methods.signature: public static string FindFile(RhinoDoc doc, string fullPathToFile)
methods.summary: Finds a file and also handles network shares. RemarksThis is a replacement for CRhinoFileUtilities::FindFile().
methods.remarks: This is a replacement for CRhinoFileUtilities::FindFile().

params.name: doc
params.doc: Document to use for locating .3dm file's folder.

params.name: fullPathToFile
params.doc: The file to be found.

methods.name: FindFile(RhinoDoc, String, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static string FindFile(RhinoDoc doc, string fullPathToFile, bool unpackFromBitmapTableIfNecessary)
methods.summary: Finds a file and also handles network shares. RemarksThis is a replacement for CRhinoFileUtilities::FindFile().
methods.remarks: This is a replacement for CRhinoFileUtilities::FindFile().

params.name: doc
params.doc: Document to use for locating .3dm file's folder.

params.name: fullPathToFile
params.doc: The file to be found.

params.name: unpackFromBitmapTableIfNecessary
params.doc: True to seasch for the file in the bitmap table and unpack it into the temp folder if not found in the initial search.

methods.name: GetUnpackedFilesCacheFolder
methods.signature: public static string GetUnpackedFilesCacheFolder(RhinoDoc doc, bool create)
methods.summary: Gets a folder associated with the document for unpacking textures to

params.name: doc
params.doc: The document the folder is associated with

params.name: create
params.doc: If true, this will create a directory if it does not exist

returns.doc: The path to the unpacked files folder

methods.name: IsCachedTextureFileInUse
methods.summary: Determines if any texture in any persistent content list is using the specified file name for caching.

params.name: textureFileName
params.doc: The file name to check for. The extension is ignored.

returns.doc: true if the texture is present.

methods.name: LoadPersistentRenderContentFromFile
methods.signature: public static RenderContent LoadPersistentRenderContentFromFile(uint docSerialNumber, string filename)
methods.summary: Loads a content from a library file and adds it to the persistent content list of a particular document.

params.name: docSerialNumber
params.doc: identifies the document into which the content should be loaded.

params.name: filename
params.doc: is the full path to the file to be loaded.

returns.doc: The loaded content or null if an error occurred.

methods.name: PromptForSaveImageFileParameters
methods.signature: public static string PromptForSaveImageFileParameters(string filename, ref int width, ref int height, ref int colorDepth)
methods.summary: Prompts the user for a save file name and the width, height and depth of an image to be saved.

params.name: filename
params.doc: The original file path.

params.name: width
params.doc: A width.

params.name: height
params.doc: An height.

params.name: colorDepth
params.doc: A color depth.

methods.name: SafeFrameEnabled
methods.summary: Queries whether or not the Safe Frame is visible.

params.name: doc
params.doc: [Missing <param name="doc"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Render.Utilities.SafeFrameEnabled(Rhino.RhinoDoc)"]

params.name: pluginId
params.doc: ID of render plug-in

returns.doc: True if plug-in found and loaded successfully. False if pluginId is invalid or was unable to load plug-in

methods.name: ShowContentChooser(Guid, Guid, RenderContentKind, Guid, RenderContent.ShowContentChooserFlags, RhinoDoc)
methods.signature: public static Utilities.ShowContentChooserResults ShowContentChooser(Guid defaultType, Guid defaultInstanceId, RenderContentKind kinds, ref Guid instanceIdOut, RenderContent.ShowContentChooserFlags flags, RhinoDoc doc)
methods.summary: Shows the content chooser to allow the user to select a new or existing content.

params.name: defaultType
params.doc: The content type that will be initially selected in the 'New' tab.

params.name: defaultInstanceId
params.doc: The content instance that will be initially selected in the 'Existing' tab.

params.name: kinds
params.doc: Semicolon-delimited string specifying which content kinds will be displayed.

params.name: instanceIdOut
params.doc: The UUID of the chosen item. Depending on eRhRdkSccResult, this can be the type id of a content type or the instance id of an existing content.

params.name: flags
params.doc: Flags controlling the chooser. Multiple selection is not valid for this call.

params.name: doc
params.doc: A Rhino document.

returns.doc: The result of displaying the chooser.

methods.name: ShowContentChooser(RhinoDoc, Guid, Guid, RenderContentKind, RenderContent.ShowContentChooserFlags, String, IEnumerable<String>, IEnumerable<Guid>, Guid[])
methods.signature: public static Utilities.ShowContentChooserResults ShowContentChooser(RhinoDoc doc, Guid defaultType, Guid defaultInstanceId, RenderContentKind kinds, RenderContent.ShowContentChooserFlags flags, string presetCategory, IEnumerable<string> categories, IEnumerable<Guid> types, out Guid[] instanceIdsOut)
methods.summary: Shows the content chooser to allow the user to select a new or existing content, or multiple contents.

params.name: doc
params.doc: A Rhino document.

params.name: defaultType
params.doc: The content type that will be initially selected in the 'New' tab.

params.name: defaultInstanceId
params.doc: The content instance that will be initially selected in the 'Existing' tab.

params.name: kinds
params.doc: Semicolon-delimited string specifying which content kinds will be displayed.

params.name: flags
params.doc: Flags controlling the chooser (tabs to hide, type of selection).

params.name: presetCategory
params.doc: Specifies the category to preset in the drop-down list on the 'New' tab. If this string is empty, the preset category will be 'All'.

params.name: categories
params.doc: Specifies the categories to display. Render contents that do not belong to one of these categories will not be listed. If this array is empty, all render contents from all categories will be listed.

params.name: types
params.doc: Specifies content types to display. Contents that are not one of these types will not be listed. If this array is empty, all content types will be listed.

params.name: instanceIdsOut
params.doc: Array of UUID(s) of the chosen item(s). Depending on eRhRdkSccResult, this can accept type id(s) of content type(s) or instance id(s) of existing content(s).

returns.doc: The result of displaying the chooser.

methods.name: ShowContentChooser(RhinoDoc, Guid, Guid, RenderContentKind, Utilities.ContentChooserFlags, String, IEnumerable<String>, IEnumerable<Guid>, Guid[])
methods.signature: public static Utilities.ShowContentChooserResults ShowContentChooser(RhinoDoc doc, Guid defaultType, Guid defaultInstanceId, RenderContentKind kinds, Utilities.ContentChooserFlags flags, string presetCategory, IEnumerable<string> categories, IEnumerable<Guid> types, out Guid[] instanceIdsOut)
methods.summary: Shows the content chooser to allow the user to select a new or existing content, or multiple contents.

params.name: doc
params.doc: A Rhino document.

params.name: defaultType
params.doc: The content type that will be initially selected in the 'New' tab.

params.name: defaultInstanceId
params.doc: The content instance that will be initially selected in the 'Existing' tab.

params.name: kinds
params.doc: Semicolon-delimited string specifying which content kinds will be displayed.

params.name: flags
params.doc: Flags controlling the chooser (tabs to hide, type of selection).

params.name: presetCategory
params.doc: Specifies the category to preset in the drop-down list on the 'New' tab. If this string is empty, the preset category will be 'All'.

params.name: categories
params.doc: Specifies the categories to display. Render contents that do not belong to one of these categories will not be listed. If this array is empty, all render contents from all categories will be listed.

params.name: types
params.doc: Specifies content types to display. Contents that are not one of these types will not be listed. If this array is empty, all content types will be listed.

params.name: instanceIdsOut
params.doc: Array of UUID(s) of the chosen item(s). Depending on eRhRdkSccResult, this can accept type id(s) of content type(s) or instance id(s) of existing content(s).

returns.doc: The result of displaying the chooser.

methods.name: ShowIORMenu
methods.signature: public static bool ShowIORMenu(IntPtr hwnd, Point pt, ref double outIOR, ref string outString)
methods.summary: Display and track the context menu.

params.name: hwnd
params.doc: The window that displays the menu, for example an edit box.

params.name: pt
params.doc: The position to display the menu at inside the window

params.name: outIOR
params.doc: Accepts the IOR value of the user's chosen substance

params.name: outString
params.doc: Accepts the name of the user's chosen substance. Can be null if not required.

returns.doc: true if the function showed the IOR menu and something was picked.

properties.name: DefaultRenderPlugInId
properties.summary: Get the plug-in Id for the default render plug-in

properties.name: ShowIncompatibleEnvironments
properties.summary: Specifies whether incompatible content should be shown in the corresponding editor.

properties.name: ShowIncompatibleMaterials
properties.summary: Specifies whether incompatible content should be shown in the corresponding editor.

properties.name: ShowIncompatibleTextures
properties.summary: Specifies whether incompatible content should be shown in the corresponding editor.
